/**
 * Format a number as Indian Rupee currency.
 */export function formatCurrency(amount){return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-IN",{style:"currency",currency:"INR",maximumFractionDigits:0}).format(amount);}/**
 * Capitalize the first letter of a string.
 */export function capitalize(str){if(!str)return str;return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+str.slice(1);}/**
 * Convert category_breakdown object to array for Recharts.
 */export function categoryToChartData(){let breakdown=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return Object.entries(breakdown).map(_ref=>{let[name,value]=_ref;return{name:capitalize(name),value};});}/**
 * Convert monthly_trend object to sorted array for Recharts.
 */export function monthlyToChartData(){let trend=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};return Object.entries(trend).sort((_ref2,_ref3)=>{let[a]=_ref2;let[b]=_ref3;return a.localeCompare(b);}).map(_ref4=>{let[month,amount]=_ref4;return{month,amount};});}/**
 * Chart color palette.
 */export const PALETTE=["#6EE7B7","#34D399","#10B981","#059669","#FCD34D","#FBBF24","#F59E0B","#D97706","#67E8F9","#22D3EE","#06B6D4","#0891B2"];
